title: kalimeris yomena subsp. angustifolia
intro: Kalimeris yomena subsp. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved Kalimeris, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Kalimeris yomena subsp. angustifolia include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
